Mood: celebratory, warm, aspirational. Color palette: indigo, warm gold, saffron and teal accents. Composition: square crop, close-up on smiling faces with soft bokeh terminal background. Text overlay suggestion: bold short headline 'Diwali Discounts — Book Now' with smaller line 'T&Cs apply' in the corner. Include space for CTA button and brand logo. for review by marketing team

result.headline: Light Up Diwali Reunions — Fly IndiGo for a Hassle-Free Celebration
result.hook: This Diwali, make every diya count. Reach family, festivals and memories — without the travel stress.
result.body:
Celebrate togetherness this festive season with IndiGo. For a limited time, we’re offering special Diwali fares and flexible booking options across our domestic network so you can plan reunions, pujas and meals with confidence. Enjoy travel that prioritizes what matters: timely departures, courteous service, and a smooth end-to-end experience.

At 6E, our promise is simple — Courteous, Hassle-free, On-time. From quick check-in to attentive cabin service and reliable flight schedules, we make the journey as joyful as the destination. Book now and benefit from straightforward fare choices, flexible change options, and easy web/mobile check-in designed to keep your trip worry-free.

Bring the lights, laughter and laddoos home — IndiGo is here to make your Diwali travel calm, comfortable and memorable. Book your seats early to secure the best options for your family trip. For review by marketing team.
result.cta: Book your Diwali journey now at www.goindigo.in or tap [BOOK NOW] to choose your preferred flight and seat.

metadata.target_audience: Leisure travelers and families (VFR) aged 25–55 in urban metros across India; existing subscribers and loyalty members planning Diwali travel
metadata.suggested_placement: Promotional email to subscriber base and 6E loyalty members — send morning batch 10–14 days before Diwali with a reminder 4–5 days before

result.dalle_prompt: A professional, high-resolution 16:9 airline banner for IndiGo celebrating Diwali and announcing a new offering. Wide-angle composition featuring a sleek IndiGo aircraft (IndiGo livery, signature Blue #1A1AAF and White) gently ascending over a warm evening sky with tasteful Diwali elements: subtle glowing diyas along the horizon, soft festive bokeh lights, and sparking but elegant firework accents in the distance. Maintain clean negative space for legible text. Include the exact bold headline text in the image: "NEW — DIWALI ROUTES NOW LIVE". Typography: use clean, modern, bold sans-serif (e.g., Montserrat/Inter/Gotham family), headline in all-caps bold, supporting text in medium weight, letterspacing slightly tightened, and clear hierarchy. Color palette: IndiGo Blue (#1A1AAF), White, warm gold accents (for diyas and sparklers), and deep navy twilight as background. Layout: aircraft on the left third in motion, festive accents on the right and lower third, headline text prominently placed on the right-center over a semi-opaque white or blue panel for maximum legibility, with a small IndiGo logo bottom-left and a subtle call-to-action line beneath the headline (e.g., "Book now for Diwali travel") in smaller type. Ensure high contrast, crisp edges, and composition optimized for 16:9 display. Keep the overall mood aspirational, premium, and festive — confident and slightly playful. Include copy note (not in image): #DiwaliWith6E #FlyIndiGo #FestiveFlights — for review by marketing team.
result.mood: Festive, aspirational, premium, warm — confident and slightly playful
